title: Report: Blackstone to Acquire 80% Stake in Sony Payment Services
text: Alternative asset manager Blackstone is reportedly set to acquire an 80% stake in Sony Payment Services, a payment service provider under Sony Group.  The deal, valued at approximately $280 million, is expected to be announced as soon as Friday (Dec. 22), Bloomberg reported Thursday (Dec. 21), citing an unnamed source.

title: Weekly Closed-End Fund Roundup: Blackstone Senior Loan CEF Cuts

title: Why I Am Downgrading Blackstone Stock From Buy To Sell

title: US Politician makes suspicious health stock purchase

title: Blackstone (BX), CPPIB Win Stake in Signature Bank Property Loan
text: A joint venture between Blackstone (BX) and CPPIB wins a stake in the $17-billion portfolio of commercial property loans from the FDIC's sale of Signature Bank debt.

title: Private-equity firms build up record $2.59 trillion in ‘dry powder,' or capital on the sidelines
text: Capital waiting to be deployed, or so-called dry powder, rose 8% to a record $2.59 trillion in the past year, S&P said Tuesday.

title: Blackstone explores sale of Anthos Therapeutics -sources
